full_text:
Xia Xun
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xia Xun. Marching General under Han Dang, was scared by Zhang Bao and unhorsed. Xia Xun is a fictional character. Xia Xun was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
